things.name: Warsaw Old Town
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage meticulously reconstructed medieval old town destroyed in WWII

things.name: Warsaw Rising Museum
things.description: Powerful tribute to the 1944 Warsaw Uprising against Nazi occupation

things.name: Royal Castle
things.description: Reconstructed royal residence housing Poland's finest art and the Polish Crown Jewels

things.name: POLIN Museum of Polish Jews
things.description: Award-winning museum telling 1,000 years of Jewish life in Poland

things.name: Wilanow Palace
things.description: Polish Versailles - Baroque royal palace with formal gardens in the city's south

things.name: Lazienki Park & Palace
things.description: Romantic 18th-century park with Palace on the Isle and Chopin concerts on summer Sundays

things.name: Palace of Culture & Science
things.description: Stalinist skyscraper gift from the Soviet Union, now Warsaw's iconic observation point

things.name: Chopin Museum
things.description: Interactive museum in a Baroque palace dedicated to Warsaw's most famous son

things.name: National Museum Warsaw
things.description: Largest art museum in Poland with ancient, medieval and contemporary Polish art

things.name: Krakowskie Przedmiescie
things.description: Royal Road of Baroque and neoclassical palaces linking the old town to Wilanow
